title: Eva parody doujin where Shinji pilots Rei
display_title: Eva parody doujin where Shinji pilots Rei
wikitext:
[]: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Dec 06, 2020 9:50 pm What the title says basically. Instead of Eva-01 it's a giant Rei. I remember seeing this on EGF years and years ago. Or did I dream that? Does amybody know what this was?

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 07, 2020 2:39 am It was a real thing, but after a decade-plus I can't remember the title.

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Dec 07, 2020 7:26 am Is it lost forever to time?

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Mon Dec 07, 2020 9:36 am Are you thinking of this? https://wiki.evageeks.org/FGC:Supplemental_Images_(Fan_Works) The translation was never finished, but I'm pretty sure the whole thing is out there in the depths of the Internet somewhere. But I'm not going to search for that.

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by Berserker » Mon Dec 07, 2020 9:47 am Why is this even a thing? Just why? People like whoever drew this doesn't have a taste at all and really like to ruin everything.

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Mon Dec 07, 2020 9:58 am Yeah, it's pretty disgusting. Of course, perversion is always there and the larger a fandom gets the more chance there is of perverted fanworks existing. I've heard of even worse things out there. For example, if anyone reading this is feeling a bit adventurous, search the forum for "Meguro Fukuzou". You will be appalled.

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by Berserker » Mon Dec 07, 2020 10:12 am Yeah, i know about Meguro. But you know, that's a whole other level.

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Dec 07, 2020 10:51 am Thanks Zusuchan. We had that huge debate on fanservicey stuff lol. So you know my opinion. I was feeling nostalgic because I remember seeing that doujin as a teen and being like "what the hell". One of the first times seeing pretty out there anime stuff.

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Mon Dec 07, 2020 12:58 pm Zusuchan wrote: Yeah, it's pretty disgusting. Of course, perversion is always there and the larger a fandom gets the more chance there is of perverted fanworks existing. I've heard of even worse things out there. For example, if anyone reading this is feeling a bit adventurous, search the forum for "Meguro Fukuzou". You will be appalled.

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by orcot » Mon Dec 07, 2020 2:43 pm well now I have a headache

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Dec 07, 2020 3:11 pm I'm sorry I caused this

[]: Re: Eva parody/doujin where Shinji pilots Rei?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Mon Dec 07, 2020 5:50 pm Jesus Christ! Now I don't know what's worse, either this doujin or the year 2020.
